name: SelectComponent
description:
Select component intended to mimic
the behaviour of the native select element.

inputs.name: advancedStateMessage
inputs.description: Holds advanced message renderer with respect to state.

inputs.name: appendTo
inputs.description: The element to which the popover should be appended.

inputs.name: ariaDescription
inputs.description: Value for aria-description

inputs.name: ariaHasPopup
inputs.description: Value for aria-haspopup

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets control aria-label attribute value

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Binds to control aria-labelledBy attribute

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether close the popover on outside click.

inputs.name: controlId
inputs.description: The ID of the control.

inputs.name: controlTemplate
inputs.description: Custom template used to build control body.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the select component is disabled.

inputs.name: fillControlMode
inputs.description:
Preset options for the Select body width, whatever is chosen, the body has a 600px limit.
* `at-least` will apply a minimum width to the body equivalent to the width of the control. - Default
* `equal` will apply a width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* 'fit-content' will apply width needed to properly display items inside, independent of control.

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: Glyph to add icon in the select component.

inputs.name: glyphFont
inputs.description: Glyph font family

inputs.name: inline
inputs.description: Should select be inlined.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Max height of the popover. Any overflowing elements will be accessible through scrolling.

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the select component should be displayed in mobile mode.

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Select Input Mobile Configuration

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder for the select. Appears in the triggerbox if no option is selected.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Whether the select component is readonly.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is mandatory field

inputs.name: scrollStrategy
inputs.description: Scrolling strategy to be used for popover.

inputs.name: selectControlClass
inputs.description: Additional classname for the select control element.

inputs.name: selectDropdownButtonClass
inputs.description: Additional classname for the select dropdown button element.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: Holds the control state of select

inputs.name: stateMessage
inputs.description: Holds the message with respect to state

inputs.name: tabOutStrategy
inputs.description:
Action to perform when user shifts focus from the dropdown.
- `close` will close the dropdown preserving previously selected value.
- `closeAndSelect` will close the dropdown and select last focused dropdown item.

inputs.name: textOverflow
inputs.description:
Controls how long text is displayed in the dropdown list of the Select component.

- `'ellipsis'`: Truncates the text with an ellipsis (`...`) if it exceeds a certain length.
- `'full'`: Displays the entire text on multiple lines, ensuring full visibility.

inputs.name: typeaheadDebounceInterval
inputs.description: Time to wait in milliseconds after the last keydown before focusing or selecting option based on alphanumeric keys.

inputs.name: unselectMissingOption
inputs.description:
If the option should be unselected and value changed to undefined, when the current value is
not presented in option array. Switching it off can be handy, when there is some delay between providing
possible options and chosen value.

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the popover open state changes.

outputs.name: valueChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the selected value of the select changes.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the open state of the select.
